posts.author: abc
posts.text: Securities Lists Industry Classification List — I usually rely on Damodaran’s data for the industry classifications. https://pages.stern.nyu.edu/~adamodar/New_Home_Page/databreakdown.html#industry You can check the industry sheet at the bottom under “Company Lookup”: https://www.stern.nyu.edu/~adamodar/pc/datasets/indname.xlsx Hope this helps. Just keep in mind the data might lag a bit behind the latest ticker inclusions (for me this covers every company I cover, including microcaps and SME stocks).

posts.author: Amey1
posts.text: Securities Lists Industry Classification List — I’m trying to download securities lists from NSE & BSE, listed on exchanges, but it do not provide any industry, sector classification / mapping for securities listed. as, per 2023 rule, websites do not show those classifications. Is there any website where I can get those classification lists? Neither their contacts are working nor nothing. I’m looking for free access not membership pro like tickertape use for exports
